4 updates

Sofia Marchetti · 24 Jun, 09:32

Called within 20 min, very warm. Relocating for a 3-month consultancy contract, start date firm.

Sofia Marchetti · 24 Jun, 14:10

Sent three Marylebone 1-bed options with virtual tour links. Strong reaction to the Devonshire St apartment.

James Okafor · 25 Jun, 11:05

Viewing booked for Friday. Budget flexible to £1,400/wk for the right place. Decision-maker on the call.

James Okafor · 26 Jun, 14:30

Confirmed strong intent and viewing went well. Marking qualified, moving to proposal stage.

Next action · due 27 Jun: Send formal proposal for Devonshire St and secure holding deposit.
